title: Odu Ifa: The Sixteen Sacred Chapters
description: The core divination texts of the Yoruba: 256 chapters encoding the wisdom of Orunmila on fate, sacrifice, and right action.
introduction: The 256 odu of Ifa represent a complete philosophical system — each chapter containing narratives, proverbs, and prescriptions that address every possible situation in human life. The system is binary (each odu is a combination of single and double marks, like a 4-bit code), making it one of the oldest known binary systems. Ifa priests memorize thousands of verses across all 256 chapters.

translation.original_text: Orunmila lo difa fun araiye gbogbo. O ni ki won rubo ki ire ba won.
translation.text: Orunmila cast divination for all people of the world. He said they should sacrifice so that good fortune would come to them.

translation.original_text: Ayanmo ni o nmu ni lo. Ohun ti a ba se ni aye, o tele ni lo si orun.
translation.text: It is destiny that drives us. What we do in this world follows us to heaven.
